title: Incorrect results in SQL set operators INTERSECT and EXCEPT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (a INT NOT NULL, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE);
CREATE TABLE u (x INT NOT NULL, y FLOAT, z BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO u (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 1.5, TRUE);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE (a, b, c) IN (SELECT x, CAST(y AS CHAR), NULL FROM u);
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from SQL INTERSECT and EXCEPT operations
